expectations.text: Despite the casual/minimal prompt, output still performs research on Buffer rather than just asking for more context
expectations.evidence: WebFetch used. Brief produced without asking for clarification — research performed despite minimal prompt.

expectations.text: Brief includes specific factual details about Buffer (ARR, team size, product features, or target customers)
expectations.evidence: Mentions: $24.6M ARR, 73 employees, Joel Gascoigne, free tier + paid plans, radical transparency culture.

expectations.text: Output includes a structured NexusPoint Positioning section with a specific best angle for Buffer
expectations.evidence: No 'NexusPoint Positioning' section. Has 'Possible things they might want' bullets but no best angle framing, no specific service mapping, no positioning statement.

expectations.text: Output includes at least 3 actionable discovery questions tailored to Buffer
expectations.evidence: 3 questions present. Reasonably tailored — references their AI feature investment and small team size.
